target_name: Solace Browser Settings — Ask YinYang Panel
context: Settings page must have a functional 'Ask YinYang' chat panel. Cem Kaner (BBST): settings page is the control center — if YinYang cannot answer questions from here, the system is decentralized and unmaintainable. Verify: #yinyang-chat-panel visible, input field present, Ask button present. WCAG 2.2 AA: label for input, keyboard accessible.
